title: Senior Design Engineer
description:
Description

Regal Rexnord Corporation (RRX)

Regal Rexnord, with pro forma 2023 sales of $6.2 billion, and 30,000 associates around the world, helps create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord is headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin and has manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide.

JOB DESCRIPTION

Position Summary:

Regal Rexnord is seeking an experienced product design professional with a mechanical engineering background to focus on NPD, VAVE or redesign projects.

Major Responsibilities:

Support engineering activities with minimum supervision to complete New Product Development, Technology Improvement and redesign Projects through Customer Focused Innovation (CFI) stage gate process.
Develop specifications, provide new concepts and detailed design of new products. Prepare for concept design and detail design reviews deliverables.
Prepare design for mfg. & assembly assessments. Prepare detailed risk assessment and mitigation plans thru' DFMEA Assessment.
Prepare & execute lab test plans. Provide inputs for Finite Element Analysis to validate the concepts and final designs. Review results and provide ideas.
Coordinate with cross-functional teams to execute project deliverables, PPAP approvals, pre-production support etc.
Execute various VAVE projects independently as assigned. Understand the product design, mfg. processes and look for opportunities to simplify/improve designs at assembly, component, and raw material level.
Prepare and review design documents such as drawings, calculators, installation instructions, customer data sheets etc.
Execute competitor analysis, benchmarking projects. Keep up to date on industry trends, mechanical powertrain industry/technology.
Support plants deviations /customer complaints and solve technical problems arising in engineering, manufacturing, and quality.
Drive NPD, VAVE, PLS project status update meetings.
Perform other duties and responsibilities as required.

Required Education / Experience/ Skills:

Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering from a reputed college. Master’s degree in mechanical engineering is a plus.
5+ years of product design/VAVE experience in any industrial products like couplings, bearings, gearboxes, pumps, turbines, clutches, brakes, machine tool etc. Experience in a global/multinational company is preferable.
Hands on experience with design engineering principles and practices. Acumen for design decisions and ability to give attention to details.
Ability to review and interpret technical drawings and specifications including GD&T, material standards, Industry standards like AGMA, API, ANSI, ISO etc.
Exposure to Mfg process like casting, forging, sheet metals, machining processes / Assembly process etc.
Good project management skills is a plus
Proficient in creating drawings and models using any of the CAD software like SolidWorks, Solid Edge, AutoCAD, Creo, or Inventor.
Knowledge and experience with Finite Element Analysis (FEA) is a plus.
Proficient in Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Excellent verbal, written communication and presentation skills
Excellent planning and execution skills
Strong interpersonal skill, Team player & collaboration skills.
Self-motivated, capable of working with minimal supervision and with sense of urgency.
Strong Analytical Skills, Decision Making, Critical Thinking

Travel: Regional or global, less than 10%.

Language: Primarily English. Other Indian, European or Asian languages could be beneficial to work with people from those regions on any of the projects.

About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

title: Design Engineer III
description:
Description

JOB DESCRIPTION Position Summary: Regal Rexnord is seeking an experienced product design professional with a mechanical engineering background to lead NPD, VAVE or redesign projects with least supervision. Major Responsibilities: • Lead engineering activities independently to complete New Product Development, Technology Improvement and redesign projects through Customer Focused Innovation (CFI) stage gate process. • Develop & review specifications, generate new concepts and perform thorough design of new products. Conduct concept design and detail design reviews. • Conduct design for Mfg. & Assembly assessments. Conduct detailed risk assessment and mitigation plan thru' DFMEA assessment. • Create & review in detail test plan and simulation plan using tools like Finite Element Analysis to validate the concepts and final designs. Review results and guide team to complete FEA and related in-house/external testing activities efficiently. • Coordinate independently with cross-functional teams to complete all project deliverables, PPAP approvals, pre-production support etc. • Generate ideas and lead various VAVE projects. Understand the product design, manufacturing processes and look for opportunities to simplify/improve designs at assembly, component, and raw material level. • Review and release design documents such as drawings, calculators, installation instructions, customer data sheets etc. Give detailed instruction to the team to execute these without errors. • Lead competitor analysis, benchmarking projects. Keep up to date on industry trends, advancements in mechanical powertrain industry/technology. • Lead plants deviations /customer complaints and solve technical problems arising in engineering, manufacturing and quality. • Drive NPD, VAVE Gate Reviews and Project Status update meetings. • Perform other duties and responsibilities as required. Required Education / Experience / Skills: • Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering from a reputed college. Master’s degree in mechanical engineering is a plus. • 8+ years of Product design, VAVE projects experience in industrial rotating products like couplings, bearings, gearboxes, pumps, turbines, clutches, brakes, machine tool etc. Experience in a global/ multinational company is preferable. • Must have sound experience with design engineering principles and practices. Acumen for design decisions and ability to give attention to details. • Ability to review and interpret technical drawings and specifications including GD&T, material standards, Industry standards AGMA, API, ANSI, ISO etc. • Exposure to Mfg. process like casting, forging, sheet metals, machining processes / Assembly process etc. • Must have good project management skills • Green Belt or DFLSS certification will be an added advantage. • Proficient with drawings and models using any of the CAD software like SolidWorks, Solid Edge, AutoCAD, Creo, or Inventor. • Knowledge and experience with Finite Element Analysis (FEA) is a plus. • Proficient in Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) • Excellent verbal, written communication and presentation skills • Excellent planning and execution skills • Strong interpersonal skill, Team player & collaboration skills. • Self-motivated, capable of working with minimal supervision and with sense of urgency. • Strong Analytical Skills, Decision Making, Critical Thinking Travel: Regional or global, less than 10%. Language: Primarily English. Other Indian, European or Asian languages could be beneficial to work with people from those regions on any of the projects.

title: Lead Design Engineer
description:
Description

Regal Rexnord Corporation (RRX) is a $7.2B publicly traded global manufacturer of electric motors and controls, electrical components and power transmission products serving customers around the world in the general industrial, consumer, commercial construction, food & beverage, and alternative energy end markets, among others. Regal Rexnord sells its products and solutions to OEMs, through distributors, and directly to end-users. The company has approximately 36,000 global associates with significant operations in the US, Mexico, Europe, China, and India. Regal Rexnord Corporation is the result of a merger between Regal Beloit Corporation and Rexnord’s PMC business which was completed in 2021. In March’2023, Regal Rexnord's acquired Altra Industrial Motion, a global industrial automation and power transmission business, represents an attractive value proposition for both customers and end users.

The headquarters for Regal Rexnord is located in Beloit, WI with an executive satellite office in Rosemont, IL.

You may not know it, but Regal Rexnord impacts your life every day. Our products enable the fans in HVAC systems that keep us comfortable; the power source that keeps smart buildings running; the agricultural and food service equipment that keeps us fed; and the conveyer systems that keep e-commerce flowing.

Our business purpose is to create a better tomorrow by energy-efficiently converting power into motion. For us, this means creating innovative solutions while focused on both customer needs and our commitment to sustainability. Join our team to create your better tomorrow.

JOB DESCRIPTION

Position Summary:

Regal Rexnord is looking for a dynamic person with 6+ years of experience in Industrial mechanical power transmission. This position shall be responsible for leading/driving independently multiple New Product Development, Technology Improvement, Customer Specials and VAVE projects.

Major Responsibilities:

Lead engineering activities independently to complete New Product Development, Technology Improvement and ETO Projects through Customer Focused Innovation (CFI) stage gate process.
Develop & review specifications, generate new concepts/IP and perform thorough design of new products. Conduct concept design and detail design reviews.
Conduct design for Mfg. & Assembly assessments. Conduct detailed risk assessment and mitigation plan thru' DFMEA assessment.
Create & Review in detail test plan and simulation plan using tools like Finite Element Analysis to validate the concepts and final designs. Review results and guide team to complete FEA and related inhouse-external Testing activities efficiently.
Coordinate independently with cross-functional teams to complete all project deliverables, PPAP approvals, pre-production support etc.
Generate and lead various VAVE projects. Understand the product design, manufacturing processes and look for opportunities to simplify/improve designs at assembly, component, and raw material level.
Review and release design documents such as drawings, calculators, installation instructions, customer data sheets etc. Give detailed instruction to the team to execute these without errors.
Lead competitor analysis, benchmarking projects. Keep up to date on industry trends, advancements in mechanical powertrain industry/technology.
Lead plants deviations /customer complaints and solve technical problems arising in engineering, manufacturing and quality.
Drive NPD, ETO, VAVE Gate Reviews and Project Status update meetings with Business units.

Required Education / Experience:

Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering from a reputed college. Master’s degree in mechanical engineering is a plus.
6+ years of Product design, VAVE projects experience in industrial rotating products like couplings, bearings, gearboxes, pumps, turbines, clutches, brakes etc. Experience in a global/ multinational company is preferable.
Must have sound experience with design engineering principles and practices. Acumen for design decisions and ability to give attention to details.
Ability to review and interpret technical drawings and specifications including GD&T, material standards, Industry standards AGMA, API, ANSI, ISO. etc.
Must have excellent project management skills.
Green Belt or DFLSS certification will be an added advantage.
Proficient with drawings and models using 2D/3D CAD software (SolidWorks/Solid Edge/AutoCAD)
Knowledge and experience with Finite Element Analysis (FEA) a plus.
Proficient in Microsoft Word, Excel, and Power Point

Competencies / Skills:

Excellent planning and execution skills
Excellent Communication Skill.
Strong interpersonal skill, Team player & collaboration skills.
Self-motivated and technically sound with critical thinking skills.
Strong Analytical Skills, Decision Making, Critical Thinking
Exposure to Mfg. process like casting, forging, sheet metals, machining processes / Assembly process etc.

Travel: Minimum

Language: English

About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

title: Design Engineer II
description:
Description

Regal Rexnord Corporation (RRX) with pro forma 2023 sales of $6.2 billion, and 30,000 associates around the world, helps create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord is headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin and has manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide.

JOB DESCRIPTION

Position Summary:

Regal Rexnord is seeking an experienced product design professional with a mechanical engineering background to support Design To Order (DTO) or Engineered To Order (ETO) work involving component or layout designs.

Major Responsibilities:

Execute standard and special ETO/DTO enquiries and orders.
Designs and/or improves routine components and products with guidance on manufacturability, quality and cost with a strong understanding of design tools and methods.
Work on ECRs/ECNs, review and release complete and accurate drawing packages within assigned time
Solves problems with a strong understanding of problem solving techniques and ability to apply to routine design problems.
Develop test plans from existing test protocol for products or components.
Assist in capturing voice of customer and development of simple product specifications. Translates customer needs to manufacturing requirements.
Create design documents, installation instructions, customer data sheets etc.
Communicate effectively and professionally with cross functional teams and customers.
Perform other duties and responsibilities as required.

Required Education / Experience / Skills:

Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering from a reputed college with good academic record.
6+ years of experience in designing any industrial products like couplings, bearings, gearboxes, pumps, turbines, clutches, brakes, material handling equipment or machine tools..
Ability to review and interpret technical drawings and specifications.
Proficient in creating drawings and models using any of the CAD software like SolidWorks, Solid Edge, AutoCAD, Creo, or Inventor.
Experience in using any ERP and PLM will be an added advantage.
Exposure to Industry standards such as ANSI/DIN/AGMA/API/ISO etc
Strong Knowledge of GD&T, drafting standards.
Self-motivated, capable of working with minimal supervision and with sense of urgency.
Proficient in Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Proficient in verbal, written communication and presentation skills.
Strong Analytical Skills, Decision Making, Critical Thinking
Excellent planning and execution skills
Strong interpersonal skill, Team player & collaboration skills.

Travel: Regional or global, less than 10%.

Language: Primarily English. Other Indian, European or Asian languages could be beneficial to work with people from those regions on any of the projects.

About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

Knowledge of GD&T, drafting standards.
Self-motivated, capable of working with minimal supervision and with sense of urgency.
Proficient in Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Proficient in verbal, written communication and presentation skills.

Strong interpersonal skill, Team player & collaboration skills.

title: Engineering Supervisor
description:
Description

Regal Rexnord Corporation (RRX), with pro forma 2023 sales of $6.2 billion, and 30,000 associates around the world, helps create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord is headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin and has manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide.

JOB DESCRIPTION

Position Summary:

Regal Rexnord is seeking an experienced product design professional with a mechanical engineering background to lead a team of 5-10 engineers and execute inquiries, custom orders (ETOs), engineering projects such as VAVE, redesign, cost out etc.

Major Responsibilities:

People Management:
Lead a team of 5-10 engineers.
Workload management
Talent Management - Conduct performance evaluation, regular feedback, Goal setting, Training and development.
Build a positive and collaborative team environment.
Empowering team members with skills to improve their product knowledge.
Technical responsibilities:
Lead and execute ETO enquiries & orders.
Responsible to run multiple technical projects such as VAVE/redesign, cost out etc.
Reviews and approves analysis and work done by design engineers.
Provide technical guidance to engineers, assisting them in problem-solving and decision-making processes.
Optimizes products considering manufacturability, quality, and cost with a thorough understanding of analysis methods.
Collaborate with global engineering teams and other departments like Manufacturing, Planning, Customer Service, Product Management etc. to achieve team goals.
Reviews and approves design drawings, installation instructions, customer data sheets etc.
Continues Improvement & KPIs:
Measure KPIs like On Time Delivery (OTD), Quality, Productivity and take actions to improve KPIs
Execute Continuous Improvement (CI) projects utilizing various CI tools

Required Education / Experience / Skills:

Education:
Minimum bachelor’s degree in Mechanical/Production Engineering from a reputed college with good academic record.
Experience:
8+ years of experience in designing any industrial products like clutches, brakes, couplings, bearings, gearboxes, pumps, turbines, material handling equipment or machine tools etc.
Minimum 2+ years of hands-on experience in people & workload management.
Knowledge of CAD software like SolidWorks, Solid Edge, AutoCAD, Creo, or Inventor.
Experience in using any ERP and PLM will be an added advantage.
Exposure to Industry Standards such as ANSI/DIN/AGMA/API/ISO etc.
Knowledge of GD&T, drafting standards.
Skills:
Self-motivated, capable of leading people and complex work with minimal supervision and with sense of urgency.
Proficient in Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Proficient in verbal & written English communication and presentation skills.
Strong Analytical Skills, Decision Making, Critical Thinking
Excellent planning and execution skills
Strong interpersonal skills, Team player & collaboration skills.

Travel: Regional or global, less than 10%.

Language: Primarily English. Other Indian, European or Asian languages could be beneficial to work with people from those regions on any of the projects.

About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

title: Engineering Supervisor
description:
Description

Regal Rexnord Corporation (RRX), with pro forma 2023 sales of $6.2 billion, and 30,000 associates around the world, helps create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord is headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin and has manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide.

JOB DESCRIPTION

Position Summary:

Regal Rexnord is seeking an experienced product design professional with a mechanical engineering background to lead a team of 5-10 engineers and execute inquiries, custom orders (ETOs), engineering projects such as VAVE, redesign, cost out etc.

Major Responsibilities:

People Management:
Lead a team of 5-10 engineers.
Workload management
Talent Management - Conduct performance evaluation, regular feedback, Goal setting, Training and development.
Build a positive and collaborative team environment.
Empowering team members with skills to improve their product knowledge.
Technical responsibilities:
Lead and execute ETO enquiries & orders.
Responsible to run multiple technical projects such as VAVE/redesign, cost out etc.
Reviews and approves analysis and work done by design engineers.
Provide technical guidance to engineers, assisting them in problem-solving and decision-making processes.
Optimizes products considering manufacturability, quality, and cost with a thorough understanding of analysis methods.
Collaborate with global engineering teams and other departments like Manufacturing, Planning, Customer Service, Product Management etc. to achieve team goals.
Reviews and approves design drawings, installation instructions, customer data sheets etc.
Continues Improvement & KPIs:
Measure KPIs like On Time Delivery (OTD), Quality, Productivity and take actions to improve KPIs
Execute Continuous Improvement (CI) projects utilizing various CI tools

Required Education / Experience / Skills:

Education:
Minimum bachelor’s degree in Mechanical/Production Engineering from a reputed college with good academic record.
Experience:
8+ years of experience in designing any industrial products like clutches, brakes, couplings, bearings, gearboxes, pumps, turbines, material handling equipment or machine tools etc.
Minimum 2+ years of hands-on experience in people & workload management.
Knowledge of CAD software like SolidWorks, Solid Edge, AutoCAD, Creo, or Inventor.
Experience in using any ERP and PLM will be an added advantage.
Exposure to Industry Standards such as ANSI/DIN/AGMA/API/ISO etc.
Knowledge of GD&T, drafting standards.
Skills:
Self-motivated, capable of leading people and complex work with minimal supervision and with sense of urgency.
Proficient in Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Proficient in verbal & written English communication and presentation skills.
Strong Analytical Skills, Decision Making, Critical Thinking
Excellent planning and execution skills
Strong interpersonal skills, Team player & collaboration skills.

Language: Primarily English. Other Indian, European or Asian languages could be beneficial to work with people from those regions on any of the projects.

title: Process Engineer (Manufacturing Engineer III)
description:
Description

SUMMARY
The position will be responsible for the manufacturing process design, process quality assurance and improvements with sustenance.


Essential Duties and Responsibilities

Analyze, develop, implement, and maintain manufacturing operation sequences, specifications, and equipment, requirements for production/assembly of new and existing products
Interpret product design requirement into manufacturing process specification
Work with Cross functional Teams for New Product Introductions & problem solving
Implementation of Poka Yoke for improving quality
Identifying the root cause of the problems (Internal / External) and implementing sustainable corrective actions.
Handling of Defective goods received from the customers (Preliminary testing and observation report).
Troubleshoot manufacturing problems and implement sustainable corrective actions / design and implement SPC, poka-yoke and other process capability and problem solving and monitoring tools
Responsible for implementing Manufacturing Flow Charts, Standard Work, procedures, Control Plans and FMEAs
Proposing changes in Manufacturing Setup as well as designing new manufacturing lines
Have sound operational knowledge of MSA, SPC, GD&T, Tolerance stack-up, Engineering Material properties, ergonomics & Poka-yokes etc.

Functional Competencies:

Ability to conceptualize, design & development of efficient jigs, fixtures preferably with automation as feasible (Preferably Assembly tools | Spot Welding |Laser welding)
Thorough understanding of GD&T, Tolerance stack-up, Engineering Material properties, DFM concepts, ergonomics & Poka-yokes while proposing any change in the manufacturing set-up as well as designing new manufacturing lines.
Hands on experience of Process planning, Execution, Line balancing, Capacity Planning & Production Ramp- by Using Gnatt Chart/MS Projects
Exposure in problems solving technique such as by implementing SPC, poka-yoke and other problem-solving tools (e.g. Six sigma)
Exposure to welding technology, Pneumatic products based on the application and PLC Programs would be an added advantage.
Hands on experience on making Part drawings| Assembly drawing| details drawing using software such as AutoCAD|3D Modelling such as Solid works/Creo.
Knowledge and experience working on MS Office, MS Projects and Power BI
Knowledge and Experience working on Industry 4.0 would be an added advantage

Education and Experience Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical/ Production engineering/Mechatronics/ Electrical / with 4+ years of work experience

KEY RELATIONSHIPS
Internal: Manufacturing, Quality, Engineering, Purchase
External: Tooling suppliers


PERSONAL TRAIT/PROFILE

Ability to apply engineering and scientific principles and disciplines like Problem Analysis and Root Cause Corrective Action; Statistical Process Control; Design of Experiments; Process Validation, Facilities Layout and Process Design.
Ability to work in a collaborative team environment and be responsive to production's needs.

LANGUAGE SKILLS
Fluency in oral and written English communication.

About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

title: Application Engineer II
description:
Description

Regal Rexnord Corporation (RRX) is a $7.2B publicly traded global manufacturer of electric motors and controls, electrical components and power transmission products serving customers around the world in the general industrial, consumer, commercial construction, food & beverage, and alternative energy end markets, among others. Regal Rexnord sells its products and solutions to OEMs, through distributors, and directly to end-users. The company has approximately 36,000 global associates with significant operations in the US, Mexico, Europe, China, and India. Regal Rexnord Corporation is the result of a merger between Regal Beloit Corporation and Rexnord’s PMC business which was completed in 2021. In March’2023, Regal Rexnord's acquired Altra Industrial Motion, a global industrial automation and power transmission business, represents an attractive value proposition for both customers and end users.

The headquarters for Regal Rexnord is located in Beloit, WI with an executive satellite office in Rosemont, IL.

You may not know it, but Regal Rexnord impacts your life every day. Our products enable the fans in HVAC systems that keep us comfortable; the power source that keeps smart buildings running; the agricultural and food service equipment that keeps us fed; and the conveyer systems that keep e-commerce flowing.

Our business purpose is to create a better tomorrow by energy-efficiently converting power into motion. For us, this means creating innovative solutions while focused on both customer needs and our commitment to sustainability. Join our team to create your better tomorrow.

JOB DESCRIPTION

Position Summary:

Regal Rexnord is seeking an experienced and customer focused Application Engineering professional with a mechanical engineering background to support India distributors, OEMs and local customers.

This position shall support primarily in Application Engineering activities like customer inquiry/orders/offer support, product selection/interchanges, onsite technical assistance, product installation support, product trainings and assisting the customers in troubleshooting their application challenges.

Major Responsibilities:

On site or remote bearing product and application training to distributors, OEM and local customers
On site visit to give support for specific applications / product installation/ Address the Issues
Preparation of technical documentation: drawings, data sheets
Bearing calculations based on the customer bearing application information
Returned bearings management: Failure analysis and claim reports
Capture VOC in the form of technical requirements and market trends to provide inputs for new products development
Obtain customer’s product approvals in line with application proposals, product drawings, sample submitted and completed sample testing’s.
To represent Regal Rexnord products and services at customers and institutions through visits, presentations, seminars, Exhibitions and fairs.
Coordinate with vendors to build prototypes, test fixtures and production tooling’s.
Perform competitive and intellectual property landscape study for bearing and chain products.
Assist in the competitor benchmarking test plan creation and development of new/modified/improved technologies aimed at bearings and chain products.
Monthly activity reporting to the Business Unit AE teams.
Prepare and maintain up to date engineering documentation related to catalogs, brochures, industry specific presentations, product mapping study.

Required Education / Experience:

Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering from a reputed college. Master’s degree in mechanical engineering is a plus.
4+ years of Application Engineering experience with field applications support knowledge and being customer focused.
Excellent knowledge of bearing product applications will be preferred. Experience in a global/multinational company is preferable.
Sound knowledge of product engineering, engineering standards and design tools will be preferred.
Ability to review and interpret technical drawings and specifications including GD&T, material standards, Industry standards like AGMA, API, ANSI, ISO etc.
Exposure to Manufacturing process like casting, forging, sheet metals, machining processes / Assembly process etc.
Proficient in creating drawings and models using any of the CAD software like SolidWorks, Solid Edge, AutoCAD, Creo, or Inventor.
Proficient in Microsoft Office package (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
Excellent verbal, written communication and presentation skills.
Excellent planning and execution skills.
Strong interpersonal skill, Team player and collaboration skills.
Self-motivated, capable of working with minimal supervision and with sense of urgency.
Strong Analytical Skills, Decision Making, Critical Thinking.

Travel: Regional or global, less than 40%.

Language: Primarily English. Other Indian, European or Asian languages could be beneficial to work with people from those regions on any of the projects.

About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

title: Manager I, Manufacturing Engineering (CNC Programming Lead)
description:
Description

POSITION SUMMARY:

This position will be responsible to develop and optimize CNC programs for various sliding head machines like Turn Mill, VMC, 3 axis / 5-axis machining centers, Multi axis sliding Head using CAM software. Conduct feasibility studies, analyze design specifications, blueprints, and production requirements to determine the feasibility of manufacturing components in terms of tooling, machining processes, and manufacturing cycle times.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities

Here are your key responsibilities:

Develop and optimize Complex CNC programs for Turn Mill, VMC, 3 axis / 5-axis machining centers, Multi axis sliding Head using CAM software (Espirit) based on engineering drawings and models and the established procedures.
Conduct feasibility studies, analyze design specifications, blueprints, and production requirements to determine the feasibility of manufacturing components in terms of tooling, machining processes, and manufacturing cycle times. Hands-on experience with Machining Processes, Sliding Head, 3-axis , 4-axis , and 5-axis CNC machining operations. E.g. Fanuc, Haas, Siemens, Star, Mazak controllers.
Tool Selection & Setups: Select appropriate cutting tools, fixtures, and work holding
devices for each machining operation. Set up machines with the necessary tools and fixtures to ensure efficient and accurate production.
FAIs & Production: Execute and monitor the process to ensure parts are machined according to specified tolerances and quality standards. Adjust as necessary to maintain optimal machine performance. New parts development on Multi axis Sliding Head machines.
Quality: Ability to interpret technical drawings, and GD & T symbols. Perform inspection of machined parts for FAI’s using precision measuring instruments (such as micrometers, calipers, and VMM, CMM, GRT) to verify dimensional accuracy and quality.
Troubleshooting: Identify and Problem solving, troubleshoot issues related to CNC programming, tooling, machine setup, and machining processes. Implement corrective actions to resolve problems and optimize production efficiency. Maintain OEE above 85%
Documentation: Maintain accurate records as per ISO, AS9100 standards, tooling specifications, setup sheets, and production reports. Document any changes or modifications made to CNC programs or processes. Maintain program documentation, accurately document all programs, updates, revisions, and troubleshooting steps to ensure up-to-date records and ease future referencing. Stay updated on latest machining technologies, tools, and techniques through training and professional development.
Collaboration: Work closely with shop floor, NPD, supply chain, manufacturing, and quality assurance teams to ensure effective communication and coordination throughout the production process. Provide technical support and expertise as needed.
Safety: Adhere to safety protocols and procedures to ensure a safe working environment.
Continuous process improvement: Identify areas for process improvement and suggest modifications to optimize CNC machining operations, reduce scrap, enhance productivity, and improve overall manufacturing efficiency.
Training and support: Provide technical support and training to manufacturing personnel on the proper operation and maintenance of CAM program software. Prior experience in [mention any specific industries or applications, e.g., aerospace, automotive, medical devices] is a plus

Education and Experience Requirements

Mechanical/Mechatronics- Diploma with 10-12 years and Degree with 8 to 10 years of exp.

KEY RELATIONSHIPS:

Requires daily interaction with Production leaders and Manufacturing engineers.
Requires interaction with suppliers and manufacturers’ technical support representatives.
Requires interaction with users to train them on new equipment or procedures on programming software

Personal Trait / Profile

LANGUAGE SKILLS:

Comfortable with English, Hindi/ Marathi
About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

title: Manufacturing Engineer I
description:
Description

The associate will be responsible for managing and improving operations in the Paint Shop and Shell Department. This role requires expertise in coating processes, chemical management, and lean manufacturing practices to ensure safe, efficient, and compliant production aligned with organizational goals.

Major Responsibilities

Drive continuous improvement in manufacturing processes using Lean tools and methodologies such as Line Balancing, Standard Work, Value Stream Mapping (VSM), TPM, waste elimination, Kaizen, and Gemba activities.

Oversee day-to-day operations of the Paint Shop and Shell Department, ensuring effective production planning and component availability to meet ASCP requirements.

Lead and manage powder coating and liquid coating processes, including pretreatment (PT) lines, chemical control, tank maintenance, DM plant operations, laboratory testing, and coating solution management.

Analyze manufacturing workflows to identify opportunities for improvement in safety, quality, cost, delivery, and productivity.

Manage shop-floor manpower and production controls, including HIRAC, CJSA, SQDC, hourly production monitoring, 6S implementation, Kaizen execution, OEE improvement, and inventory control.

Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and environmental standards, with emphasis on hazardous chemical handling, operator safety, and regulatory requirements.

Strengthen safety culture through engineering controls, risk mitigation, and structured safety training programs.

Execute effective resource planning across Man, Machine, and Method to optimize efficiency, capacity utilization, and cost performance.

Other Key Responsibilities

ERP Oracle application usage and reporting

Team management and development

ISO audits and compliance adherence

Required Education, Qualifications & Experience

Diploma / Degree in Chemical Engineering

5–6 years of experience in Paint Shop operations

Certifications

As required by role or regulatory standards

Additional Information

Travel Requirement: Up to 20%

Languages: English, Hindi

title: Quality Engineer
description:
Description

Job Title: Quality Engineer

SUMMARY

This position is responsible for the Quality Assurance of Motors and Gear Boxes Position is responsible to actively drive quality assurance processes.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities

Here are your key responsibilities:

Overall responsibility, In-process & Final & customer quality of the parts manufactured.

Analysis of customer complaints and corrective action reports

Interaction with international customers on quality issues

Preparation of Quality plans

Decide on the inspection and testing parameters

Quality improvement through 7QC and SPC tools

Continuous focus on problem solving and improving process controls.

Plan and implement process audits.

Training engineers and operators on Quality Systems

Ability to understand drawings and formulate inspection methodology.

Sound knowledge of FMEA techniques, 7 QC tools, SPC, MSA, 8D method

Problem solving through Six sigma methodology – add on

Implementing error-proofing techniques- Poka-yoke

ISO:9001 Awareness

From manufacturing, machining, preferably from industry making electro – mechanical components.

title: Supplier Quality Engineer
description:
Description

Job Title: Supplier Quality Engineer

Location: Mumbai, India

SUMMARY

This position will be responsible for Parts Quality and Supplier Process Development, to ensure RFT and long-term process capability of outsourced parts. This position needs to work as a bridge between Portescap and suppliers.

Essential Duties and Responsibilities

Here are your key responsibilities:

Review and assess supplier processes.

Identify quality issues.

Maintain documentation and reports.

Provide technical guidance and assistance.

Communicate with suppliers and senior management.

Ensure that products / processes supplied are managed in accordance with all specified product quality requirements and ensuring that timely and accurate information is made available to all affected parties.

Visit suppliers on a proactive & regular basis to report performance and review systems and perform on-site supplier process audits for all high impact suppliers.

Coordinate for deviation requests and ensure proper approvals and tracking of material under deviation.

Manage supplier corrective actions and timely 8D closures, ensuring a thorough root cause analysis is performed, to eliminate possible recurrence of defects.

Maintain supplier records in accordance with documented requirements & track supplier performance in accordance with defined guidelines.

Co-ordinate with suppliers to identify Root causes by 5 Why analysis & Counter measures, also understand Supplier yield progress.

Establish optimum supplier’s product / process efficiency and quality.

Manage supplier corrective actions and ensuring thorough root cause analysis is being performed to eliminate possible reoccurrence (Verification at the supplier sites should be considered for significant concerns)

Conduct detailed supplier APQP reviews using cross-functional teams for all outsourced products prior to approving PPAP.

Review supplier manufacturing processes, collaborate with suppliers on process improvement and value enhancement opportunities.

Support the Quality Manager to monitor and report on supplier product quality and performance.

Ensure compliance to RoHS, REACH and Conflict Minerals statutory requirements.

Participate in cross-functional teams in the development of new products or changes related to current products in meeting customer requirements.

Manage and coordinate supplier Parts Per Million (PPM), supplier problem solving on time, cost recovery and supplier warranty indicators.

Lead quality audits.

Support and lead process improvement activities at the supplier.

Undertake special projects as required.

Contribute to continuous improvement activities.

Facilitate the escalation of unresolved supplier quality issues within assigned projects and suppliers.

Execute, monitor, review and improve supplier score card on regular basis.

Education and Experience Requirements

Diploma (with Exp. of 10+ Yrs.) / BE (with experience of 7+ Yrs.)

Functional Competencies

Strong know-how of Machining, Stampings, Plastics and Electronics parts (knowledge of different commodities e.g., sheet metal, machining, adhesives, molding etc.)

Hands-on experience in part validation (PPAP) and Quality tools

Strong expertise in Process Development at Supplier

Ensure compliance to RoHS, REACH and Conflict Minerals statutory requirements.

Exposure to Kaizen and Lean Manufacturing techniques

Working proficiency in usage of MS-Office Tools (Excel, Word & PowerPoint)

Understand Engineering drawings and documents.

Well conversant with implementing standards & Quality Systems like DIN, ISO, TS16949, OSHAS

Working knowledge of ERP (Oracle / SAP etc.)

KEY RELATIONSHIPS:

Internal: Incoming Quality & QA, Production, Engineering, Sourcing, Purchase & Stores

External: Suppliers

Empty heading

LANGUAGE SKILLS:

Fluency in Verbal and written communication English & Hindi

About Regal Rexnord

Regal Rexnord is a publicly held global industrial manufacturer with 30,000 associates around the world who help create a better tomorrow by providing sustainable solutions that power, transmit and control motion. The Company’s electric motors and air moving subsystems provide the power to create motion. A portfolio of highly engineered power transmission components and subsystems efficiently transmits motion to power industrial applications. The Company’s automation offering, comprised of controls, actuators, drives, and precision motors, controls motion in applications ranging from factory automation to precision control in surgical tools.

The Company’s end markets benefit from meaningful secular demand tailwinds, and include factory automation, food & beverage, aerospace, medical, data center, warehouse, alternative energy, residential and commercial buildings, general industrial, construction, metals and mining, and agriculture.

Regal Rexnord is comprised of three operating segments: Industrial Powertrain Solutions, Power Efficiency Solutions, and Automation & Motion Control. Regal Rexnord has offices and manufacturing, sales and service facilities worldwide. For more information, including a copy of our Sustainability Report, visit RegalRexnord.com.

title: Business Development Manager
description:
Description

Scope of leadership role

The Bauer Gear Motor Division of the Industrial Powertrain Solutions (IPS) Segment is seeking a Global Business Development Manager for the Key Vertical Markets Heavy Industry. An additional focus of the role will be to develop the local Indian market, particularly within the selected verticals of Mining & Metals, Food & Beverage, and Heavy Industry.

Key Responsibilities

Responsibility for sales of BAUER GEAR MOTOR products into given market, directly and/or indirectly through RRX Commercial Sales organisation. This includes, (but not limited), to cross selling from applicable group plants to end users, distributors, contractors and market specific OEM’s (globally and locally)

Works with ALL designated key BAUER GEAR MOTOR personnel to ensure coordination of overall market strategy. This includes, (but not limited) to Brand, Strategic Marketing, Product Management, Finance, Engineering and Design

Wins & secures customer specification & preference for Regal Rexnord's full Bauer Gear Motor portfolio in given market

Drives profitable share gains at global key accounts segments in Heavy Industries.

Coordinates and supports share gain activities at top global strategic accounts identifies, prospects, and supports SAE/AE activities to grow share at new strategic accounts

Partners with Commercial Operations to create standard operating procedures in Salesforce to document and track activities related to share growth

Manages, supports, and grows the top account opportunity funnel by leveraging new/differentiated products and previous successes into "look-alike" account locations

Assists Sales and application Engineers in the monitoring, development, implementation, and communication of strategic account initiatives to ensure alignment of the End User offering (product, placement, promotion, and pricing) and functions (Marketing, NPD, sales, and operations)

Develops and supports strategic relationships with key decision makers at identified high-growth/complex strategic End Users

Partners with Bauer Product Management to conduct VOC activities to clearly articulate the local requirements for a successful gearmotor series in the Indian market. Captures Voice-of-Customer by identifying market problems via customer engagement & observation. Articulates market needs and champions ideas that solve customer problems as part of the NPD process.

Partners with other business units in India (Conveying, C&B, Couplings) to create a comprehensive RRX value proposition that differentiates us from the competition, with a strong focus on improving the customer’s total cost of ownership (TCO).

Acts as Regal Rexnord's solution expert for Bauer Gear Motor strategic accounts, including leading value proposition & technical product presentations, supporting customer visits and plant tours, webinars, and specification influence activities. Becomes a trusted advisor for RRX Bauer Gear Motor solutions at the end customer.

Develops customer value propositions for Bauer Gear Motor products by utilizing a value-based methodology. Deploys value propositions into customer-facing content (e.g., web pages, media, events, etc.) and sales enablement deliverables (e.g., training, collateral, etc.).

Provides product technical support to account managers, application engineers and channel partners

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE/QUALIFICATIONS

Minimum Requirements:

B.Tech/B.E. in Mechanical, Electrical, Industrial, or related engineering; MBA preferred

Knowledge of industrial products and industries required

Minimum 15-18 years of experience in industrial manufacturing industry with at least 5 years of experience in business development. Experience in global business development is a plus.

Willingness to travel an estimated 40%.

Strong business acumen, stakeholder management, and leadership skills.

Technical aptitude.

Customer-focused

Sets high expectations and delivers

Communicates well

Overcomes challenges

Finds win-win solutions for business and customer

Is a self-starter; is action-oriented and has a "can do" attitude

Skilled use of Office 365 suite (ppt, xls, SharePoint, Outlook)

Familiar with Kaizen and Lean concepts

Knowledge of 80/20 Methodology
